desc.en: The Algiers Metro is a rapid transit system serving Algiers, the capital of Algeria. Currently, it consists of one operational line, with extension lines under construction. The system began operations in 2011 after decades of planning and construction. As of 2023, the operational network spans approximately 18.5 kilometers, has 19 stations, and serves around 200,000 passengers daily. The Algiers Metro is the second metro system in Africa after the Cairo Metro, and it plays a crucial role in alleviating traffic congestion in this densely populated capital city.
desc.zh: 阿尔及尔地铁是服务于阿尔及利亚首都阿尔及尔的快速交通系统。目前由一条运营线路组成，还有扩展线路正在建设中。该系统在经过数十年的规划和建设后于2011年开始运营。截至2023年，运营网络跨越约18.5公里，拥有19个站点，每日服务约20万乘客。阿尔及尔地铁是继开罗地铁之后非洲第二个地铁系统，它在缓解人口密集的首都城市交通拥堵方面发挥着至关重要的作用。
